hero_subtitle: SFTY consolidates KYT vendor outputs into a single compliance operating layer to streamline wallet risk management, case handling, and audit-ready review without siloed systems.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: KYT vendor outputs lack unified control
problem_description: Compliance teams managing multiple KYT providers face fragmented data streams that slow down risk assessment and increase manual reconciliation. This disconnection creates gaps in traceability and weakens audit readiness across wallet risk and transaction monitoring workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates and normalizes outputs from multiple KYT providers into one workflow that links wallet risk signals, alerts, cases and audit evidence for streamlined review and operational control.
workflow_title: From fragmented KYT outputs to review
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet risk signals from multiple providers into structured alerts, routes them into cases, supports review and records evidence for compliance decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond KYT silos. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented KYT vendor outputs into unified workflows, cases, decisions and evidence to help VASPs manage wallet risk without operational silos or manual handoffs.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_title: Built for managing KYT vendor outputs
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP operations by consolidating KYT provider data into a controlled, auditable workflow with evidence preservation and enterprise-ready deployment governance.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects fragmented digital asset compliance checks into structured reviews, workflows, decisions, cases and reports to help teams operate efficiently and maintain regulatory readiness.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage KYT vendor outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates KYT wallet risk, transaction alerts and provider outputs into one connected workflow layer, reducing manual silos and enabling consistent review and case management.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case histories, decision logs and supporting evidence in audit-ready formats to support compliance review, inspections and reporting workflows workflows.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY can connect with multiple KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers to connect outputs without replacing current tools or disrupting existing compliance stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing providers, connecting their outputs into operational workflows rather than replacing underlying KYC, KYT, Travel Rule or screening solutions.
final_title: Bring KYT vendor outputs into one workflow
final_description: Review how SFTY organizes KYT alerts, wallet risk data and case evidence into a connected compliance operating layer.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
